"'''You're in the Army Now!'''" is an adventure for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' written by [[James L. Cambias]]. It was published in [[May]] [[1994]] in the [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 2|second issue]] of ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]''. It was updated and reprinted in [[1997]] in ''[[Classic Adventures: Volume Four — The Best of the Journal]]''.
